name: scg-contabilidad
description: Sistema de Administración Ganadera — React + Node

scripts.install:all: npm install --include=dev && npm install --prefix server --include=dev && npm install --prefix client --include=dev
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n API,WEB -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "node scripts/wait-api-ready.mjs && npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.build:render: npm run install:all && npm run build
scripts.build:vercel: npm run install:all && npm run build
